The goal is at a bearing of +7 degrees (slight_right) and a distance of 268 cm (close).
The previous action was MOVE_FORWARD, which resulted in a reward of +397.647 and a distance reduction from 666 cm to 268 cm (progress of ~398 cm). This confirms that moving forward was efficient.
The bearing has shifted slightly to the right (+7 degrees). While the goal is now slightly to the right, the distance is very close (268 cm).
The skills suggest that when "slight_right & far", MOVE_FORWARD is preferred. However, the distance is now "close".
The recent experience "[aligned, close] MOVE_FORWARD → progress +398cm (good)" suggests that moving forward is still effective even when close.
Given the small bearing error (+7 degrees) and the close distance, continuing to move forward is likely to bring the agent within the stopping threshold (< 200 cm) or at least very close. Turning might be unnecessary if the path is clear.
Therefore, the best action is to continue moving forward.
